articles.author: Anand Krishnamoorthy
articles.title: US Stock Futures Drop After Tech Selloff, Oil Up: Markets Wrap - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: A selloff in technology stocks gathered pace as the artificial-intelligence trade unwound, dragging down shares of major chipmakers after a blistering rally. Oil climbed after Iran fired missiles at Israel.
